mapper.select: select id, user_name, display_name, email, status, create_time, update_time from sys_user where status = 1 order by create_time desc

select id, user_name, display_name, email, status, create_time, update_time from sys_user where user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or display_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by create_time desc
